name: Naver Maps
description: The most accurate and up-to-date map of Korea. Used by locals daily.
features: Real-time transit info|Walking & driving directions|Bus & subway routes|Restaurant & shop reviews
tips: Switch to English in settings. More accurate than Google Maps in Korea.

name: Kakao T
description: Korea's #1 ride-hailing and taxi app. Available nationwide.
tips: Add a card beforehand to skip cash hassle. Cheaper than regular taxis.

name: Papago
description: Naver's AI translator. Best accuracy for Korean ↔ English.
tips: Use the camera mode to translate menus instantly — it's a lifesaver.

name: Coupang Eats
description: Korea's biggest food delivery platform with massive selection.
features: Food delivery|Real-time tracking|Wide restaurant selection|Reviews & ratings
tips: Even convenience store items can be delivered within 30 minutes.

name: KakaoTalk
description: Korea's national messaging app. Almost everyone uses it.
features: Free messaging|Voice & video calls|Group chats|Payment via KakaoPay
tips: Use the 'Plus Friends' feature to get info from official tourism accounts.

name: Subway Korea
description: Comprehensive subway guide for all major Korean cities.
features: Offline subway maps|Route planning|Transfer guidance|Last train times
tips: Download offline maps before traveling underground where signal is weak.

name: Mangoplate
description: Korea's Yelp — curated restaurant reviews by food enthusiasts.
tips: Filter by 'Foreigner Friendly' to find English-menu restaurants easily.

name: Korail Talk
description: Official KTX & intercity train booking app from Korea Rail.
tips: Book popular routes (Seoul-Busan) at least a day ahead, especially weekends.

name: Visit Korea
description: Official tourism app by the Korea Tourism Organization.
features: Tourist spot guides|Events calendar|Tour packages|Audio guides
tips: Check the events calendar — many free cultural events happen year-round.

name: Baemin
description: Korea's beloved food delivery app, known for great UX.
tips: Has an English mode — great for ordering Korean fried chicken late night.
